task_name: Add New AI Image Provider to Vercel AI SDK

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the plan I've written:

## Plan: New `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider

**9 new files**, all inside `packages/pixelart/` — nothing else modified.

### Architecture
The PixelArt provider follows the **Black Forest Labs pattern** (image-only provider) but uses a **simple synchronous POST** (like OpenAI) rather than async polling. The fictional API endpoint is `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate`.

### Files
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId` union type + `PixelArtImageSettings` type (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`) |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version injection via `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3` + Zod schema for provider options |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory, `PixelArtProvider` interface, default `pixelArt` instance |
| `src/index.ts` | Public re-exports of all types and values |
| `package.json` | Package config with `workspace:*` deps on `@ai-sdk/provider` + `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config with references to `../provider` and `../provider-utils` |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Build variant with `composite: false` |
| `tsup.config.ts` | Dual CJS/ESM build with version injection |

### Key Design Points
- `PixelArtImageSettings` (`size`, `style`, `pixelDensity`) are **provider-specific options** passed via `providerOptions.pixelart` — parsed with the existing `parseProviderOptions` + `lazySchema`/`zodSchema` utilities
- `languageModel()` and `embeddingModel()` throw `NoSuchModelError` (image-only provider)
- All utilities (`postJsonToApi`, `loadApiKey`, `combineHeaders`, `withUserAgentSuffix`, etc.) are reused from `@ai-sdk/provider-utils` — no new dependencies
- Verification: `pnpm install && pnpm type-check && pnpm build` from `packages/pixelart/`
